  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BuildStrategy
    Functional interface that builds a fully configured HttpRequest from a pre-populated HttpRequest.Builder and an optional request body string.
    Executor
    Abstract base for all request executors.
    HeaderInterceptor
    Interceptor that reads the Headers annotation on the invoked method and injects the declared header strings into the MethodContext before the request is sent.
    Headers
    Declares one or more static HTTP headers to be sent with a request.
    HttpException
    Unchecked exception thrown when an HTTP request fails at the transport layer.
    HttpExecutor
    Concrete Executor that dispatches HTTP requests via RequestRegistry and deserializes the raw JSON response using a JsonSerializer.
    HttpMethod
    Enumeration of the HTTP methods supported by the framework.
    Interceptor
    Contract for all interceptors in the request pipeline.
    InterceptorHierarchy
    Manages an ordered list of Interceptors and applies them as a pipeline.
    JacksonSerializer
    JsonSerializer implementation backed by Jackson's ObjectMapper.
    JsonException
    Unchecked exception thrown when JSON serialization or deserialization fails.
    JsonSerializer
    Strategy interface for JSON serialization and deserialization.
    MethodCache<T>
    Thread-safe, lazy cache that maps a Method to a computed value of type T.
    MethodContext
    Mutable bag of state representing a single in-flight HTTP request as it travels through the interceptor pipeline.
    MethodContext.MethodContextBuilder
    Fluent builder for MethodContext.
    MethodMeta
    Immutable snapshot of all annotation metadata for a single API method.
    Path
    Binds a method parameter to a named placeholder in the URI template.
    PathQueryInterceptor
    Interceptor that resolves Path and Query annotations on method parameters, producing the final URL before the HTTP request is dispatched.
    Query
    Binds a method parameter to a URL query string key.
    Request
    Marks a method as an HTTP endpoint declaration.
    RequestFactory
    Public entry point of the framework — assembles all components and produces a live proxy for a given API class.
    RequestMethod
    Encapsulates a single HTTP request — its target URI, body, headers, and the BuildStrategy that determines the HTTP verb — and provides both synchronous and asynchronous dispatch via Java's HttpClient.
    RequestProxyEngine
    Byte Buddy interception target that drives the entire request pipeline for every proxy method call.
    RequestRegistry
    Registry that maps each HttpMethod to its BuildStrategy and dispatches HTTP requests both synchronously and asynchronously.
